name: Dividend Yield
description: Calcula el rendimiento por dividendo de una acción.
seo_title: Dividend Yield Gratuita – Rápido y Preciso
seo_description: Calcula el interes compuesto en ahorros con depositos regulares. Ve como crece tu dinero con diferentes tasas y frecuencias de aporte.
example_label: Calculating dividend yield for stock paying $2.80 annual dividend at $62.50 share price.
result_context: The yield_pct of {yield_pct}% shows annual dividend income as percentage of share price.

steps.description: Divide annual dividend by share price

mistakes: Using trailing dividend without checking for recent cuts or increases
Focusing only on yield without considering total return
